title: Multiplicative
description: Vanilla-friendly modpack with a cool experience for nerds and lazy people
body: ### NOTE: I'm gonna update this modpack sooner or later, it's not abandoned, I've just been busy. # Multiplicative A modpack which does things right ## Why? Most vanilla-friendly modpacks lacked a lot of nice mods, so I made my own. This one is based on Additive. ## Where? This modpack is meant to be used on vanilla-compatible servers or singleplayer. It's available on Modrinth and GitHub. ## Mod list [Full list of mods ->](https://github.com/MenacingPerson/Multiplicative/blob/main/conf/mod-list.md) The main features, apart from all the Additive features, are: - Better look and feel (Enhances visuals, sound, fonts, GUI, and a lot more) - Cool Cosmetics (Cosmetica) - Flight simulator-like elytra physics - Item Viewer (EMI) - No Chat Reports - Fullbright ## Some mods may be bannable on public servers - [Do a Barrel Roll ->](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) This changes elytra flight. However, it doesn't change any flight physics. - [Freecam ->](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) Self-explanatory. It complies with modrinth rules, though, so I suppose it's okay. - [No Chat Reports ->](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) Disable chat reporting and telemetry. ## Disclaimer While this modpack is based on Additive, it is not related to it. All issues regarding this modpack should be directed to me, not the Additive developer. ### [Additive ->](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive)
